character.name: 구울 중형 v3
character.prompt: Berserk dark fantasy grotesque medium undead ghoul, hunched humanoid zombie abomination, multiple bloodshot eyeballs growing from bloated belly and torso like tumors, exposed ribs and rotting organs visible, one arm grotesquely oversized with bone blade, face torn open showing teeth and jaw, patches of green-gray rotting flesh hanging off, dark veins across body, hellish undead monster
